title: daemon store create_channel bumps state_seq on INSERT OR IGNORE no-op
description: create_channel (store.rs ~line 1046) calls INSERT OR IGNORE then unconditionally increments the space state_seq. When the channel already exists the insert is a no-op but state_seq still advances. This causes spurious state token changes that trigger unnecessary SSE pushes and can cause JMAP clients to request a full resync when no data actually changed.
